name: Focus Graphite Inc.
description: Focus Graphite Inc. is an advanced exploration and development company focused on the production of high-grade flake graphite. The company's flagship asset is the Lac Knife crystalline flake graphite project located in the Côte-Nord region of Quebec, Canada. Focus Graphite aims to become a leading supplier of high-quality graphite concentrate and value-added graphite products, including spherical graphite for the lithium-ion battery market, supporting the global transition to clean energy.
